meta.title: Ameen Haieck — Graphic Designer
meta.description: Ameen Haieck designs visual identities that hold up — branding, editorial design and digital work since 2015.

hero.tagline: Since 2015, I've helped businesses, institutions and organizations transform ideas into meaningful visual identities through branding, editorial design and digital experiences.

about.heading: A decade shaping how brands are seen
about.paragraph1: Since 2015, I've worked with companies, institutions and organizations across many industries — always starting from the same place: understand the story, then give it a shape that lasts.
